work_summary: Three major deliverables: (1) Admin fullstack enhancement — 8 features (manual request create, chat histories, friend timeline, PDF reports, audit menu, design system components, live chat create/archive, file metadata update) with 2 DB migrations. (2) Security/a11y review fixes — 17 findings addressed from 3 multi-model reviews (Codex BE, Codex FE, Gemini) including DEV_AUTH_BYPASS flag, is_active checks, HUMAN mode guard, path traversal fix, await on LINE blob API. (3) Landing page redesign — government theme with LINE green, TH/EN toggle, theme toggle, professional footer.
priority_actions: Fix Vercel build error on PR #10 (landing page)
Test landing page in WSL browser (theme + language toggles)
Fix PR #9 Koyeb CLI install ordering for CD
context_for_next_agent: Three open PRs: PR #7 (merged), PR #9 (CD fix, 1 medium issue), PR #10 (landing page, build error). Main branch has 8 new admin features + 17 security fixes. DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true must be in backend .env for local dev. Button component now has asChild support with separate render path.

9.title: fix(cd): skip backend when env missing

cross_platform_read.key_insight: Merged PR #7/#8 to main, CD failed, opened PR #9
Live-chat hardening complete, needs manual QA
